input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.5.4
            TITLE: each fastened attachment point to a composite accumulator container requires backing

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.5.4: Each fastened attachment point to a composite Accumulator Container requires backing
F.10.5.4 Each fastened attachment point to a composite Accumulator Container requires backing 
plates that are one of the two: 
a. Steel with a thickness of 2 mm minimum  
b. Alternate materials Equivalent to 2 mm thickness steel

final_answer: rule F.10.5.4: Each fastened attachment point to a composite Accumulator Container requires backing F.10.5.4 Each fastened attachment point to a composite Accumulator Container requires backing plates that are one of the two: a. Steel with a thickness of 2 mm minimum b. Alternate materials Equivalent to 2 mm thickness steel
